zh.lifeSummary: 當Otto Botetourt於大約1303年出生在英國時，他的父親John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt38歲，母親Maud fitz Thomas35歲。他和Sibyl Deincourt至少有1個兒子。他去世於1345年11月11日在英國亨廷格多史爾哈莫頓享年43歲。

nameMeanings.name: Otto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a short form of any of the various Germanic compound personal names containing the element od, ot ‘prosperity, wealth’ ( compare the corresponding Old English ēad in names such as Edward and Edwin ). St Otto of Bamberg ( d. 1139 ) was a missionary to the Pomeranians. Otto the Great ( 912–73 ) is generally regarded as the founder of the Holy Roman Empire, and the name has been borne by several members of German and Austrian royal houses. It was recorded occasionally among immigrants to England from the Low Countries in the 14th century, but failed to establish itself. Since the 19th century it has again been used occasionally in the English-speaking world, mostly among immigrants from Germanic countries.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Otto Botetourt was born about 1303, in England, his father, John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt, was 38 and his mother, Maud fitz Thomas, was 35. He had at least 1 son with Sibyl Deincourt. He died on 11 November 1345, in Hamerton, Huntingdonshire, England, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Otto Botetourt est né environ 1303, à Angleterre, son père, John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Maud fitz Thomas, avait 35 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Sibyl Deincourt. Il est décédé le 11 novembre 1345, à Hamerton, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Otto Botetourt um 1303 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt 38 und seine Mutter Maud fitz Thomas 35. Er hatte mit Sibyl Deincourt mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 11. November 1345 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Hamerton, Huntingdonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Otto Botetourt è nato il circa 1303 nel England, il suo padre, John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Maud fitz Thomas, aveva 35 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Sibyl Deincourt. Morì il 11 novembre 1345, nel Hamerton, Huntingdonshire, England, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Otto Botetourtが約1303年にイギリスで生まれた時，父John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourtは38歳，母Maud fitz Thomasは35歳であった。彼はSibyl Deincourtとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1345年11月11日にイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアハムルトンで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Otto Botetourt(이)가 대략 1303년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud fitz Thomas(은)는 35세였다. 그는 Sibyl Deincourt(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1345년 11월 11일 영국 헌틴그도실르 함르턴에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Otto Botetourt nasceu aproximadamente 1303, em Inglaterra, seu pai, John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Maud fitz Thomas, tinha 35 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Sibyl Deincourt. Ele faleceu em 11 de novembro de 1345, em Hamerton, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Otto Botetourt родился около 1303 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud fitz Thomas, 35. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Sibyl Deincourt. Он умер 11 ноября 1345 г. в местности хамиртон, хантингдоншир, Англия в возрасте 43 лет.
